body:
Bumps [julia-actions/setup-julia](https://github.com/julia-actions/setup-julia) from 2 to 3.
Release notes

Sourced from julia-actions/setup-julia's releases.

v3.0.0

:warning: Breaking Changes, and Migration Guide for v2 ⟶ v3

  1. v3 requires Node 24 (compared to v2, which required Node 20).
  2. The behavior of version: min has changed between v2 and v3.
    • In v2, version: min would resolve to the minimum major/minor/patch, e.g. 1.10.0.
    • In v3, version: min resolves to the minimum major/minor but the latest patch, e.g. 1.10.11.
    • If you specifically want the minimum major/minor/patch under v3, you should specify version: min-patch. Note: v3 also adds the alias version: min-minor, which is equivalent to version: min.
  3. v3 will throw an error if x86_64 Julia binaries are requested on Apple Silicon macOS. (Under v2, this was a warning.) Under v3, if you specifically want to run x86_64 Julia binaries on Apple Silicon (under Rosetta 2), you must now opt-in by specifying the force-arch: true input.

Other Changes

We updated some dependencies, and we improved and updated the CI tooling on this repo.

Full Changelog

Full Changelog: https://github.com/julia-actions/setup-julia/compare/v2.7.0...v3.0.0

v2.7.0

Documentation

  • Make the README less misleading by putting some reasonable defaults in (instead of empty strings '') by @​DilumAluthge in julia-actions/setup-julia#302

Dependencies

  • Bump julia-actions/setup-julia from 2.6.0 to 2.6.1 by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#304
  • Bump nock from 13.5.5 to 13.5.6 by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#305
  • Bump prettier from 3.3.3 to 3.4.1 by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#306
  • Bump @​vercel/ncc from 0.38.2 to 0.38.3 by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#309
  • Bump @​types/node from 22.9.0 to 22.10.1 by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#307
  • Bump @​types/node from 22.10.1 to 22.13.0 by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#314
  • Bump nock from 13.5.6 to 14.0.0 by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#313
  • Bump typescript from 5.6.3 to 5.7.3 by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#317
  • Bump semver from 7.6.3 to 7.7.0 by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#315
  • Bump undici from 5.28.4 to 5.28.5 by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#312
  • Bump @​actions/tool-cache from 2.0.1 to 2.0.2 by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#316
  • Bump prettier from 3.4.1 to 3.4.2 by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#310
  • Bump typescript from 5.7.3 to 5.8.2 by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#321
  • Bump prettier from 3.4.2 to 3.5.2 by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#323
  • Bump nock from 14.0.0 to 14.0.1 by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#324
  • Bump @​types/node from 22.13.0 to 22.13.8 by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#325
  • Bump prettier from 3.5.2 to 3.5.3 by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#326
  • Bump typescript from 5.8.2 to 5.8.3 by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#331
  • Bump nock from 14.0.1 to 14.0.4 by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#332
  • Bump @​types/node from 22.13.8 to 22.15.3 by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#333
  • Bump undici from 5.28.5 to 5.29.0 by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#334
  • Bump ts-jest from 29.2.5 to 29.3.2 by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#330
  • [CI] Group dependabot PRs by @​giordano in julia-actions/setup-julia#341
  • Bump the all-npm-actions group with 4 updates by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#342
  • Bump asdf-vm/actions from 3.0.2 to 4.0.0 by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#340
  • Bump the all-npm-actions group with 6 updates by @​dependabot[bot] in julia-actions/setup-julia#343

... (truncated)

Commits
  • 4a12c5f Breaking: Change min to return the latest patch (but still the minimum majo...
  • a8c65a2 Bump the all-github-actions group across 1 directory with 2 updates (#381)
  • 92d77f5 Bump picomatch from 2.3.1 to 2.3.2 (#379)
  • 679f144 Bump handlebars from 4.7.8 to 4.7.9 (#377)
  • 7c976c8 Add workflow to run make everything-from-scratch (#378)
  • 101e139 Breaking: Migrate from Node 20 to Node 24 (#374)
  • 44a615a Require opt-in via force-arch to run x86 on macOS arm (#352)
  • See full diff in compare view
